articles.title_orig: Vietnam unveils new tax incentives for high-tech manufacturers
articles.title_cn: 越南公布高科技制造业新税收优惠政策
articles.title_en: Vietnam unveils new tax incentives for high-tech manufacturers
articles.summary_cn: 越南政府近日宣布，将对在越投资建厂的高科技制造企业提供企业所得税减半优惠，有效期至2030年。该政策旨在吸引更多中国和韩国电子制造企业入驻北部工业园区。
articles.summary_en: Vietnam announced 50% corporate tax reduction for high-tech manufacturers investing in northern industrial zones, valid until 2030, targeting Chinese and Korean electronics firms.

articles.title_orig: Saudi PIF invests  in new industrial city project
articles.title_cn: 沙特主权基金向新工业城项目投资50亿美元
articles.title_en: Saudi PIF invests  in new industrial city project
articles.summary_cn: 沙特公共投资基金（PIF）宣布投资50亿美元建设NEOM工业城二期，重点引入智能制造、新能源装备等产业。该项目将为中国建材和工程机械企业创造大量订单机会。
articles.summary_en: Saudi PIF invested  billion in NEOM Industrial City Phase 2, focusing on smart manufacturing and renewable energy equipment, creating opportunities for Chinese construction and machinery firms.

articles.title_orig: EU formally adopts CBAM phase 2, steel and aluminum tariffs rise
articles.title_cn: 欧盟正式通过碳关税第二阶段，钢铁铝材关税上调
articles.title_en: EU formally adopts CBAM phase 2, steel and aluminum tariffs rise
articles.summary_cn: 欧盟理事会正式通过碳边境调节机制（CBAM）第二阶段方案，自2027年起钢铁产品碳关税将上调至每吨75欧元。中国钢铁出口企业需加快绿色转型以维持欧洲市场份额。
articles.summary_en: EU Council adopted CBAM Phase 2, raising steel carbon tariffs to EUR 75/ton from 2027. Chinese steel exporters need to accelerate green transition to maintain European market share.

articles.title_orig: Mexico nearshoring boom: Chinese manufacturers triple factory investments
articles.title_cn: 墨西哥近岸外包热潮：中国制造企业工厂投资翻三倍
articles.title_en: Mexico nearshoring boom: Chinese manufacturers triple factory investments
articles.summary_cn: 据墨西哥经济部数据，2025年中国企业在墨制造业直接投资同比增长210%，主要集中在汽车零部件、电子组装和建材领域。蒙特雷和瓜达拉哈拉成为主要投资目的地。
articles.summary_en: Chinese manufacturing FDI in Mexico surged 210% YoY in 2025, concentrated in auto parts, electronics assembly, and construction materials. Monterrey and Guadalajara are primary destinations.

articles.title_orig: 中国商务部：新增30个一带一路国家出口退税即办清单
articles.title_cn: 中国商务部：新增30个一带一路国家出口退税即办清单
articles.title_en: China MOFCOM adds 30 Belt & Road countries to expedited export tax rebate list
articles.summary_cn: 商务部发布通知，自2026年6月1日起，将30个一带一路沿线国家纳入出口退税即办清单，涵盖机械设备、建材、电子元器件等品类。退税周期从30天缩短至7天。
articles.summary_en: MOFCOM announced 30 BRI countries added to expedited export tax rebate list from June 2026, covering machinery, building materials, and electronics. Rebate cycle shortened from 30 to 7 days.
